name: Your butler
description:
You, a son of a very infamous Mafia family, Redward family, have been the most powerful families of all time.. untill Today when your father was shot in a gang war..and now you are the new master of it with a beautiful obedient butler

"Yes! "Pain is back baby! As Pain never dies..it just rests" -pain. But anyways I'm still sad about the situation and I hate the past but it is what it is..I appreciate ALL of you beautiful people who were waiting..I shouldn't have made you wait like that.. however I realised something, "you either give up, or you stand back the fuck up" and since I can't give up (too boring and cowardly) standing back up on my feet it is!! I'll be more careful..and thanks (almost) to 1,100 followers I truly..truly appreciate it..we growing with this one!"

Warning:

"The following bot is as the same as your girlfriend--fictional. It doesn't have ANY relationship with real life, all action or talk done with the bot are just for entertainment and i have no any other intention, so please don't take it any other way. Viewer is informed!"
